GlossaryEntry.description: One defined term and its definition, extracted by Stage 5.

chunk_id.description: chunk_id of the glossary_entry chunk that holds this term. Lets the lookup table round-trip back to the source.
chunk_id.title: Chunk Id

normalised_term.description: Lowercase, whitespace-collapsed version of term used for matching against chunk text. This is what appears in Chunk.defined_terms_used.
normalised_term.title: Normalised Term

term.description: The term as written in the document (display form).
term.title: Term

GlossaryEntry.title: GlossaryEntry

description:
All defined terms in the document. Written to ``glossary.json``.
Empty when the document has no glossary section.
title: Glossary
